CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(Fax), "", HYPERLINK("tel:" & Fax, IF(LEFT(Fax, 3) = "+55", IF(LEN(Fax) = 14, "+55 (" & MID(Fax, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(Fax, 6, 5) & "-" & MID(Fax, 11, 4), IF(LEN(Fax) = 13, "+55 (" & MID(Fax, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(Fax, 6, 4) & "-" & MID(Fax, 10, 4), Fax)), Fax)))
CustomField.label: Fax (exibição)
